title: S + V + N, who/which + V（非限定關係子句）

formulas.zh: 名詞，引導非限定關係子句的關係代名詞 who，補充說明先行詞（人）
名詞，引導非限定關係子句的關係代名詞 which，補充說明先行詞（事物/地點）

explanation: 非限定關係子句使用關係代名詞 who/which 引導，前面加逗號與主句分離。此子句提供補充資訊而非限定先行詞身份，去掉不影響主句完整意義。不可用 that，因 that 只用於限定用法。動詞需與先行詞數、人稱一致。注意逗號位置—逗號在關係詞之前，標示非限定性。常見於說明人物背景、補充事物特性等場景。

examples.eng: My uncle, who works as a doctor, has just retired from his hospital.
examples.chi: 我的叔叔，他是一位醫生，剛從他的醫院退休。

examples.eng: The Amazon rainforest, which covers millions of square kilometers, produces much of Earth's oxygen.
examples.chi: 亞馬遜雨林，覆蓋數百萬平方公里，產生地球大部分的氧氣。

examples.eng: Shakespeare, who lived in the 16th century, wrote many famous plays and sonnets.
examples.chi: 莎士比亞，住在十六世紀，寫了許多著名的戲劇和十四行詩。

examples.eng: The smartphone, which has become essential in modern life, has changed how we communicate.
examples.chi: 智慧型手機，在現代生活中變得至關重要，改變了我們溝通的方式。

extension.tip: 判斷方法：先看有無逗號。有逗號表非限定用法，用 who/which；無逗號表限定用法，可用 who/which/that。另判斷先行詞是人或物：人用 who，物/地點用 which。非限定子句去掉後主句仍通順完整。

examples.test: My teacher, who speaks three languages, comes from France.
examples.result: → 正確。who 引導非限定子句，補充說明 teacher 的背景，去掉後『My teacher comes from France』仍完整。

examples.test: The student who scored highest passed the exam.
examples.result: → 限定用法，無逗號。who 用來指定是哪一位學生，不可刪除。

examples.test: The book, that I bought yesterday, is very interesting. ✗
examples.result: → 錯誤。非限定用法不可用 that，應改為 which。正確：The book, which I bought yesterday, is very interesting.

extension.note: 非限定→逗號→who/which；限定→無逗號→who/which/that

parts: discovered radium, made significant contributions to science.
exercises.sentence: Marie Curie, who discovered radium, made significant contributions to science.
exercises.translation: 瑪麗居禮，她發現了鐳，對科學做出了重大貢獻。

parts: has revolutionized how we access information, is one of the greatest inventions.
exercises.sentence: The Internet, which has revolutionized how we access information, is one of the greatest inventions.
exercises.translation: 網際網路，它徹底改變了我們獲取資訊的方式，是最偉大的發明之一。

parts: has lived abroad for five years, recently visited my hometown.
exercises.sentence: My best friend, who has lived abroad for five years, recently visited my hometown.
exercises.translation: 我最好的朋友，他已在國外住了五年，最近回訪了我的家鄉。

parts: form a natural border between several European countries, attract millions of tourists annually.
exercises.sentence: The Alps, which form a natural border between several European countries, attract millions of tourists annually.
exercises.translation: 阿爾卑斯山，它形成了幾個歐洲國家間的天然邊界，每年吸引數百萬遊客。

vocab_table.zh: 引導關係子句的關係代名詞（指人）
引導關係子句的關係代名詞（指事物、地點）
分隔主句與非限定關係子句的標點符號
非限定子句提供額外背景或說明
被關係詞所修飾的名詞或名詞片語
去掉子句不影響主句完整性
關係詞的動詞需與先行詞人稱一致
關係詞的動詞需與先行詞單複數一致
為先行詞提供補充、背景或額外資訊
非限定用法不可用 that 關係代名詞
整個關係子句可視為插入主句的補充說明

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的非限定關係子句形式，補充人物背景資訊
mc_exercises.question_eng: My friend Sarah, _______ graduated from Oxford University, now works as a lawyer.
mc_exercises.explanation: 非限定關係子句修飾人物應用 who。B 項 that 只能用於限定關係子句，不能用逗號分隔。C 項 which 用於物或事物。D 項 whom 作受詞，但此句 graduated 為不及物動詞需主詞，故不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別非限定關係子句與限定關係子句的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: The museum, _______ opened last year, has attracted thousands of visitors from around the world.
mc_exercises.explanation: 非限定關係子句（前有逗號）修飾事物用 which。A 項 that 用於限定關係子句，不能接逗號。C 項 it 為代詞，無法引導子句。D 項 what 為疑問詞或連接詞，不用於非限定關係子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷關係代名詞並確保動詞與先行詞數一致
mc_exercises.question_eng: Einstein, _______ developed the theory of relativity, revolutionized our understanding of physics and space.
mc_exercises.explanation: 非限定關係子句修飾人物 Einstein，需用 who 作主詞。A 項 which 用於物。B 項 whom 作受詞不符。D 項 that 不能用於非限定子句（有逗號分隔）。developed 需主詞，所以 who 正確。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句式：辨別多個關係子句的正確形式與標點
mc_exercises.question_eng: Dr. Chen, _______ has published numerous research papers and won several international awards, _______ conducts groundbreaking studies in genetic engineering.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空為非限定關係子句修飾人物 Dr. Chen，用 who；第二空為主要動詞 conducts 的主詞應為 who，但此處可用 that 作限定用法補充前述資訊。標準答案是 who 配 that 以區別子句性質，或改用 who / and she。A 項最符合此非限定+限定的複合結構邏輯。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我的英文老師，她今年教了我們很多有趣的文法。
translation_exercises.answer: My English teacher, who taught us a lot of interesting grammar this year, is very dedicated.
key_points: 逗號位置在who之前和之後
hints: 句型框架：N, who + V...（逗號在who前後）
注意：不可用that；who後的動詞must與先行詞teacher一致

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我的數學課本，它已經用了三年，現在有點破舊了。
translation_exercises.answer: My math textbook, which I have used for three years, is getting worn out now.
key_points: 逗號標示補充資訊性質
have used搭配時間副詞for three years
hints: 句型框架：N, which + V...（which代替物體）
易錯點：which後可接及物動詞+受詞（I have used）；不能用that因為是非限定用法

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我的好友林明，他在學校辯論隊表現傑出，最近被選為隊長。
translation_exercises.answer: My best friend Ming Lin, who has performed excellently in the school debate team, was recently elected captain.
key_points: My best friend Ming Lin（先行詞）
who引導非限定關係子句補充說明
has performed完成式表達至今為止的傑出表現
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N, who + V...（誰的身份或特性補充說明）
易錯點：who後的動詞時態應呼應語境；非限定用法去掉逗號後從句就失去意義

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份氣候變遷研究報告，它由我校環保社團耗時一年完成，獲得了市政府的高度認可。
translation_exercises.answer: This climate change research report, which was completed by our school's environmental club over one year, has been highly recognized by the municipal government.
key_points: This climate change research report（先行詞）
which引導非限定關係子句提供補充背景
被動語態was completed適合描述報告的完成過程
hints: 句型框架：S + V + N, which + V...（補充事物的來源、過程或特性）
易錯點：which後的被動語態動詞must與先行詞report單數一致；若改用that會改為限定用法，改變句意
